title: dryopteris macrotis
intro: Dryopteris macrotis, also known as the Long-leaved Buckler Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris macrotis include soothing digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
